title: Mould King W16 Engine Building Blocks Set, Combustion Engine Model That Runs, Mini Engine Build Kit for Adults with Battery and Motor, STEM Toy for Children Boys Girl(952 Pcs)
features: ▶【 W-TYPE 16 CYLINDER ENGINE SCALE MODEL】This model building block kit compatible with mainstream building blocks, based on the prototype of W16 Engine, as a total of 952+ pieces bricks. --Note: If you find a missing item in the package, please contact us via email, we will immediately send the missing item to you for free.

▶【REALISTIC MODEL THAT WORKS】 Mould King W16 Engine set contains many realistic details. Such as transparent cylinder head, simulate piston motion, turbocharger and refined exhaust system. Designed specifically for race car fans. The perfect gift for car lovers and future engineers!

▶【Transparent Cylinder Head Design】This product is powered by the equipped battery and reproduces the dynamic principle for you 1:1. Through the transparent cylinder cover, the movement of the piston can be observed.

▶【Premium Quality Material】Mould King 10131 Engine Kits made from child-friendly ABS materials and tested for quality control to ensure compliance with child safety standards. No smell, no burr, smooth and eco-friendly. You can assemble with confidence and safety.

▶【STEM Engine Toy】Mould King building sets are the best for kids to recreate scenes from the dream up their own original stories. And it is a good collection. For any occasion such as New Years Day, Christmas, Birthday, Childrens Day, Easter, Halloween, Chanukkah, STEM, Summer Camp Activities, Back To School.
description: Product Description MOULD KING 10131 W-TYPE 16 CYLINDER ENGINE MODEL KIT - 952PCS Mould King Engine Series Build Your Own W16 Engine Previous page Mould King Engine Series Transparent Cylinder Head Design Mould King Engine Series Precise Piston Movement Mould King Engine Series The Drivetrain Operates Mould King 10131 engine is able to connect the power and run driven by the motor. Next page 1 Transparent Cylinder Head 2 Precise Piston Movement 3 The Drivetrain Operates A Fantasic Gift For Engine Lovers Easy to Assemble It comes with 952 pieces which are sorted in different bags, making it very easy to use. With a step-by-step guide, you'll find an easier way to enjoy the pleasurable process.
